title: End-to-end smoke: Claude Code reads the brain without naming Notion
userStory: As Steve, I want three real questions answered from the graph so that Phase 1 can be declared done.
acceptanceCriteria: In personal/, prompt 'what is the latest status on my Acme application?' returns a relevant answer sourced from the graph
Prompt 'who did I last DM that responded?' returns a relevant answer
Prompt 'show me the voice rules for outreach' returns the expected episodes
.claude/logs/inject_memory.log shows the hook fired and returned hits for each prompt
